title: Interior Design Essentials
description:
This  career-focused online course based on  LaSalle College Vancouver's acclaimed Interior Design Diploma   will introduce you  to the fundamental concepts of Interior Design.   
 You will learn to identify key design trends and the movements they descend from. You will also understand colour theory and how colour has an impact on our perception of space.   
 By the end of this course, you will apply this knowledge to develop compelling interior design concepts and mood boards for client presentations.   
 This short course is suitable for anyone looking to build or switch towards a rewarding Interior Design career.
